name: VAT Validator MCP
description: AI-powered VAT fraud detection and live VAT validation via EU VIES (27 member states), UK HMRC, and AU ABR. Call before invoice approval, supplier onboarding, or cross-border payment. Detects missing trader fraud, carousel fraud, deregistered entity re-use. Returns CLEAR/REVIEW/BLOCK verdict.

tools.name: validate_vat
tools.description: Validates EU VAT numbers against EU VIES (all 27 member states) and AU ABR in real time. Returns valid/invalid, registered company name, address.

tools.name: validate_uk_vat
tools.description: Validates UK VAT numbers against HMRC VAT API v2 via OAuth2. Returns valid/invalid, registered business name, address.

tools.name: get_vat_rates
tools.description: Returns current standard, reduced, and zero VAT rates for all 27 EU member states and UK.

tools.name: batch_validate
tools.description: Validates multiple VAT numbers against EU VIES and HMRC in one call. Returns per-number verdicts in structured JSON.

tools.name: analyse_vat_risk
tools.description: AI-powered VAT fraud risk scoring. Detects missing trader fraud, carousel fraud, deregistered entity re-use. Returns CLEAR/REVIEW/BLOCK recommendation, risk score 0-100, fraud signals, agent_action (PROCEED/VERIFY_MANUALLY/HOLD).

tools.name: compare_invoice_details
tools.description: Cross-checks invoice VAT details against live VIES and HMRC registry data. Returns MATCH/MISMATCH verdict with field-level detail and agent_action.
